= Contractile Templates

Blank templates for projects that want to replace the hyperpolymath
defaults with their own contractile definitions.

Copy the relevant file to `.machine_readable/contractiles/<type>/`
and fill in your project-specific checks.

The working examples in `.machine_readable/contractiles/` show the
full hyperpolymath setup — use those as reference.
